name: Funding Pipeline Triage Agent
buyer: Business funding brokers, loan brokers, ISOs, alternative finance affiliates, sales teams
pain_solved: Messy inbound funding leads, scattered emails, incomplete applicant data, and slow follow-up.
monetization: Template sale, setup fee, monthly CRM hygiene retainer, broker enablement bundle.

name: Incomplete Application Rescue Agent
buyer: Funding brokers, affiliate teams, fintech sales teams, enrollment teams
pain_solved: Applicants abandon forms, fail to connect bank accounts, miss documents, or get stuck before underwriting.
monetization: Dead-deal rescue playbook, monthly follow-up service, broker automation setup.

name: Partner Launch Kit Builder
buyer: Affiliate programs, broker networks, referral programs, partner managers
pain_solved: New partners enroll, get excited, then do absolutely nothing because nobody gave them a usable launch system.
monetization: Per-partner launch kit, paid onboarding service, partner portal add-on, affiliate enablement SaaS-lite.

name: Broker Profile Builder
buyer: Broker networks, affiliate managers, independent funding brokers, franchise teams
pain_solved: Partner profile pages sound generic, weak, or unfinished, and do not route prospects toward useful resources.
monetization: Profile setup fee, profile page package, white-label partner directory service.

name: Funding Tool Router Agent
buyer: Agencies, brokers, affiliate operators, fintech teams with multiple calculators and lead magnets
pain_solved: Too many tools, landing pages, and calculators; no clear system for what to send to whom.
monetization: Asset routing template, partner enablement add-on, consulting setup, monthly asset optimization.

name: Content-to-Agent Repurposer
buyer: Creators, coaches, consultants, training companies, internal ops teams
pain_solved: Content exists but is not operationalized into reusable workflows, agents, or SOPs.
monetization: Prompt pack, agent library setup, content repurposing service, paid workshop.

name: SOP Goblin
buyer: Agencies, founders, operators, fractional COOs, automation consultants
pain_solved: Workflows live in chat threads, screenshots, memory, and caffeine-fueled chaos.
monetization: SOP template, done-for-you SOP conversion, internal ops retainer.

name: Vercel Asset Librarian
buyer: Indie hackers, agencies, no-code/AI builders, product studios
pain_solved: Too many deployed projects and repos with no clean map of status, purpose, audience, or next action.
monetization: Portfolio audit, repo cleanup service, asset inventory template, monthly ops review.

name: Partner Training Coach
buyer: Affiliate programs, broker teams, sales enablement leaders, network marketing teams
pain_solved: New reps do not know what to say, who to contact, or how to build daily momentum.
monetization: Training agent, paid partner community upgrade, onboarding bundle, accountability add-on.

name: Local Referral Partner Scout
buyer: Business funding brokers, consultants, local agencies, accountants, referral-based sales teams
pain_solved: Local referral partners are valuable but hard to identify, qualify, and approach without sounding like a commission gremlin.
monetization: Local outreach sprint package, referral partner database template, setup service, workshop.

name: CRM Note Cleaner
buyer: Sales teams, brokers, consultants, agencies, service businesses
pain_solved: CRM notes are inconsistent, incomplete, bloated, or too sloppy to act on later.
monetization: CRM cleanup service, HubSpot/Notion template, automation setup.

name: Inbox Revenue Signal Scanner
buyer: Founders, brokers, consultants, sales operators
pain_solved: Important revenue signals hide inside email noise.
monetization: Inbox triage agent setup, daily digest automation, sales ops retainer.

name: Applicant Support Agent
buyer: Funding brokers, fintech firms, application-heavy service businesses
pain_solved: Applicants ask repetitive questions about next steps, documents, timelines, bank connection, and eligibility.
monetization: Support agent, applicant portal add-on, FAQ automation, managed support setup.

name: Market Intel Scout
buyer: Founders, agencies, content strategists, affiliate marketers, fintech operators
pain_solved: Market changes, competitor moves, offers, and content opportunities are scattered and easy to miss.
monetization: Weekly intel report, competitor dashboard, content strategy subscription.

name: SEO Article Brief Builder
buyer: Content teams, bloggers, affiliate marketers, agencies, niche site operators
pain_solved: Articles get published without keyword focus, structure, internal links, FAQs, or conversion intent.
monetization: SEO brief template, blog ops service, monthly content planning retainer.

name: Video-to-Blog Transformer
buyer: Podcasters, YouTubers, training companies, creators, agencies
pain_solved: Video content is trapped in transcripts instead of becoming articles, newsletters, and social content.
monetization: Repurposing service, content engine template, monthly production package.

name: Lead Magnet Factory Agent
buyer: Agencies, consultants, affiliate marketers, SaaS founders, creators
pain_solved: Brands need useful lead magnets that solve painful problems and collect qualified leads.
monetization: Lead magnet pack, Notion template sales, custom GPT/wrapper builds, funnel setup.

name: Affiliate Offer Matchmaker
buyer: Affiliate marketers, content brands, broker networks, niche site operators
pain_solved: Affiliate offers are scattered and hard to match to content, audience, and funnel intent.
monetization: Affiliate offer database, content monetization audit, monthly offer optimization.

name: Business Credit Builder Coach
buyer: Small business owners, funding clients, consultants, credit-building service providers
pain_solved: Business owners do not know what to fix before applying for funding or building business credit.
monetization: Paid template, managed business credit service, readiness audit, coaching package.

name: Cash Flow Copilot
buyer: Small business owners, solopreneurs, e-commerce sellers, consultants
pain_solved: Operators do not understand short-term cash gaps, revenue recovery timelines, or cash-flow priorities.
monetization: Cash-flow dashboard template, advisory retainer, finance ops service.

name: Micro-Acquisition Deal Screener
buyer: Indie buyers, micro-SaaS buyers, acquisition entrepreneurs, small investors
pain_solved: Buyers need quick screening before wasting time on weak micro-business acquisition opportunities.
monetization: Deal screener template, paid acquisition readiness tool, advisory package.

name: Grant Opportunity Scout
buyer: Small businesses, nonprofits, veteran founders, grant writers, consultants
pain_solved: Grant opportunities are hard to track, qualify, and convert into action-ready applications.
monetization: Grant scout dashboard, paid research reports, application prep package.

name: Meeting-to-Action Agent
buyer: Founders, consultants, operators, sales teams, project managers
pain_solved: Meetings create ideas but not clean tasks, owners, notes, or follow-up messages.
monetization: Meeting ops template, executive assistant workflow, team productivity service.

name: Community Event Builder
buyer: Community builders, local business groups, coaches, meetup hosts, chambers
pain_solved: Events are vague, under-positioned, and fail to connect community, education, and monetization.
monetization: Event planning template, community launch kit, sponsor package, local event consulting.

name: Agency Offer Architect
buyer: Consultants, freelancers, AI automation agencies, no-code builders
pain_solved: Service offers are vague, hard to sell, and not packaged into clear deliverables.
monetization: Offer strategy session, Notion template, productized service buildout.

name: AI Wrapper Product Manager
buyer: No-code builders, AI consultants, founders, affiliate marketers
pain_solved: AI wrapper ideas are everywhere, but few are scoped into real MVPs with inputs, outputs, UX, and monetization.
monetization: MVP spec service, prompt pack, wrapper build package, GitHub starter repo.

name: Notion Database Architect
buyer: Founders, operators, agencies, consultants, creators
pain_solved: Notion workspaces become messy because databases are created without schema, relations, or operating rules.
monetization: Workspace setup, database template pack, ops consulting.

name: Automation Workflow Spec Writer
buyer: Automation agencies, founders, n8n/Make/Zapier builders, ops teams
pain_solved: Automations fail because the workflow was never specified clearly before someone started wiring spaghetti.
monetization: Automation spec template, build-ready workflow docs, implementation consulting.
